title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 262.660 - Certain persons not to be beneficiaries
text:
262.660.  Certain persons not to be beneficiaries. — No money shall be paid out under sections 262.630 to 262.660 for the services, traveling expenses or hotel bills of any officers or local committees or of any person or persons under pay of the state department of agriculture, college of agriculture or state teachers' colleges.
(RSMo 1939 § 14318) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12660; 1919 § 12150
